title: resurfaced
description: Making underwater exploration easier in a simple way
body:
![created for modfest 1.20](https://github.com/JR1811/Boatism/blob/master/extrernal/promo/badges/created_for_modfest_1_20.png?raw=true)

# Resurfaced
A very simple mod providing changes for under water exploration.

## Features

### Air tanks
Replenish your air underwater with refillable air tanks with a simple click

### Frozen Oceans
Beware when diving into frozen oceans because you may find yourself a little cold. Bring some leather armor to stay warm 

### Scuba Helmet
This Old fashioned diving device is reduces oxygen consumption (not implemented yet)
